title: Im Sorry To Disappoint You All
company: the vastness of the city, an unravelling begins.
description: I'm sorry to disappoint you allPerformers and co-choreographers - Mette Nilsen and Charis CrudgingtonMusic and composition - Phoebe CocoFilm editing - Charis CrudgingtonIn This RoomPerformers and co-creators - Lucy Andrina, Inez Watson, Martine Pierquin, Millie Packham, Rosie Owen, Georgie Sutton, Linn Johansson, Sharanya Chakraborty, Daisy Hatch, Ana Maria Martins and Jamie RandallAdditional co-creation and filming - Zita Baynes and Liz LeighMusic and composition - Daniel CrudgingtonFilm editing - Charis Crudgington Venues:The Dance Space - The Jamie Watton Creation Space The Dance Space - The Jamie Watton Creation Space
content_warnings: The work alludes to depressive and obsessive thoughts through poetic language
